title: crepis foetida subsp. commutata
intro: Crepis foetida subsp. commutata, also known as the hoary hawk's-beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Crepis foetida subsp. commutata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, while also being used to treat skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to create salves and ointments for topical application.
